evals.expected_output: A structured review flagging the SQL injection vulnerability, recommending parameterized queries, and noting naming/typing improvements.
expectations: Recommends parameterized queries with example code
Feedback is structured by severity or category

evals.prompt: Check my PR diff for performance and maintainability problems before I merge.
evals.expected_output: A review organized by category (security, performance, maintainability) with concrete findings referencing the changed lines, or a clean bill if none.
expectations: Review covers security, performance, and maintainability dimensions
Each finding references the specific code location

evals.prompt: Does this class violate SOLID principles? It opens the DB connection, formats reports, and sends emails.
evals.expected_output: Identifies the single-responsibility violation, proposes a decomposition, and shows the refactored structure.
expectations: Proposes a concrete decomposition into focused classes
Explains why the change improves maintainability
